title: Ask for an extension
subtitle: Be honest and propose a new time.
overview: Be honest and propose a new time.
Module: Practical Writing. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: A responsible extension request gives a reason and a realistic new deadline.
负责任的延期请求会给出原因和现实的新截止时间。
Useful frame: purpose, key detail, polite request, and next step.
实用框架：目的、关键细节、礼貌请求和下一步。
Would it be possible to have until Friday morning? I need the extra time because I want to check the examples carefully instead of sending a rushed version.
是否可以延到周五上午？我需要额外时间，因为我想仔细检查例子，而不是发送一个匆忙版本。

items.en: A responsible extension request gives a reason and a realistic new deadline.
items.zh: 负责任的延期请求会给出原因和现实的新截止时间。

items.en: Useful frame: purpose, key detail, polite request, and next step.
items.zh: 实用框架：目的、关键细节、礼貌请求和下一步。

items.en: Would it be possible to have until Friday morning? I need the extra time because I want to check the examples carefully instead of sending a rushed version.
items.zh: 是否可以延到周五上午？我需要额外时间，因为我想仔细检查例子，而不是发送一个匆忙版本。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Would it be possible to have until Friday morning? I need the extra time because I want to check the examples carefully instead of sending a rushed version.
lines.zh: 是否可以延到周五上午？我需要额外时间，因为我想仔细检查例子，而不是发送一个匆忙版本。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
